{{Expand}}

{{Infobox madra
| name = Cool breath
| introduced = House of Blades
}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Cool breath]] flows into [[Simon]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c12">''House of Blades'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
